title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 184.368 - Question to be submitted
text:
184.368.  Question to be submitted. — For the purpose of incurring additional indebtedness as provided herein the board of the district shall submit the question to the voters of the district.
(L. 1969 3d Ex. Sess. H.B. 23 § 10, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971)
